title: fragaria vesca subsp. semperflorens
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. semperflorens is a perennial strawberry plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its small, edible strawberries and ever-bearing flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca subsp. semperflorens include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cancer and other diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
